calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Payette for and with Jean Hsu (Executrix).

Mr. Payette stated that he spoke to the Objector's Attorney, that no Creditor's Claim was ever filed, and that he was told by the Attorney that there would not be any objection. The Court granted the petition (order for the same signed in open Court).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-13-2010 Continued To Sep-27-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lee-Nah Hsu (Daughter of Decedent) in Propria Persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. Ms. Hsu stated that she entrusted her Mother with $50,000.00, that her Mother opened a sepcific account at Wells Fargo, that it was her life savings, that it was turned over to the Sister and that she told her Sister that the money was hers. The matter was continued to September 27, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court advised Ms. Hsu to seek Counsel.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
